title: linum corymbiferum subsp. corymbiferum
intro: Linum corymbiferum subsp. corymbiferum, also known as the Mediterranean flax or wild flax, is a plant species in the genus Linum that is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Linum corymbiferum subsp. corymbiferum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions to utilize its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal agent.
